---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a feature for AZL Language
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
Short description of the feature (keeping in mind [AZL language rules](https://github.com/AZBCBA/AZL-Language/blob/main/docs/language/AZL_LANGUAGE_RULES.md) — AZL is component-based and event-driven).

## Motivation
Why is this feature useful? Which use case does it enable?

## Proposal
How could it work? (syntax / API / behavior)

## Alternatives
Any alternative designs or existing workarounds.

## Additional context
Links, examples, or references.
